prompt:
Add MemTest86+ boot entry and hardware diagnostic packages to all full NixOS hosts. Specifically:

1. Add `boot.loader.systemd-boot.memtest86.enable = true;` to the common system module (modules/common/system.nix) so it applies to all hosts using systemd-boot.

2. Add these hardware diagnostic packages to the environment.systemPackages in modules/common/system.nix:
   - smartmontools
   - nvme-cli
   - lm_sensors
   - memtester

The repo uses a common module pattern — modules/common/system.nix is imported by all full NixOS hosts. Put both changes there so every host gets them.

Make sure to check the existing content of modules/common/system.nix first to avoid duplicates and place the additions in the right spots.
